records.ety: [Cf. F. simplifier, LL. simplificare. See Simple, and -fy.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Simplified (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Simplifying (?).]

defs: To make simple; to make less complex; to make clear by giving the explanation for; to show an easier or shorter process for doing or making.
quotes: The collection of duties is drawn to a point, and so far simplified.
It is important, in scientific pursuits, to be caitious in simplifying our deductions.
